subcodes.first_line: O thou leaf who hast supplicated at His Most Exalted Threshold! Give thanks unto thy Lord, inasmuch as He hath illumined thy pure reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المبتهله الی العتبه العالیه اشکری مولاک بما نور حقیقتک الصافیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @light and darkness, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
